'''âz-d-t-v''' ('''kazadtevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phenocopy|phenocopy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phenocopy|phenocopy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-d-t-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazadtevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadtevoko|thizadtevoko]] || [[word:jizadtevoko|jizadtevoko]] || [[word:shizadtevoko|shizadtevoko]] || [[word:kizadtevoko|kizadtevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadtevoko|thuthuzadtevoko]] || [[word:jujuzadtevoko|jujuzadtevoko]] || [[word:shushuzadtevoko|shushuzadtevoko]] || [[word:kukuzadtevoko|kukuzadtevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadtevoko|thuzadtevoko]] || [[word:juzadtevoko|juzadtevoko]] || [[word:shuzadtevoko|shuzadtevoko]] || [[word:kuzadtevoko|kuzadtevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzadtevoko|thuzadtevoko]] || [[word:juzadtevoko|juzadtevoko]] || [[word:shuzadtevoko|shuzadtevoko]] || [[word:kuzadtevoko|kuzadtevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezadtevoko|thezadtevoko]] || [[word:jezadtevoko|jezadtevoko]] || [[word:shezadtevoko|shezadtevoko]] || [[word:kezadtevoko|kezadtevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozadtevoko|thozadtevoko]] || [[word:jozadtevoko|jozadtevoko]] || [[word:shozadtevoko|shozadtevoko]] || [[word:kozadtevoko|kozadtevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadtevoko|thozadtevoko]] || [[word:jozadtevoko|jozadtevoko]] || [[word:shozadtevoko|shozadtevoko]] || [[word:kozadtevoko|kozadtevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzadtevoko|thĂŠzadtevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzadtevoko|jĂŠzadtevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzadtevoko|shĂŠzadtevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzadtevoko|kĂŠzadtevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazadtevoko|thathazadtevoko]] || [[word:jajazadtevoko|jajazadtevoko]] || [[word:shashazadtevoko|shashazadtevoko]] || [[word:kakazadtevoko|kakazadtevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazadtevoko|thazadtevoko]] || [[word:jazadtevoko|jazadtevoko]] || [[word:shazadtevoko|shazadtevoko]] || [[word:kazadtevoko|kazadtevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadtevoko|thazadtevoko]] || [[word:jazadtevoko|jazadtevoko]] || [[word:shazadtevoko|shazadtevoko]] || [[word:kazadtevoko|kazadtevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
